features.name: sva_assert_property_with_clock
features.description: Code should include an assert property statement with a clocking event @(posedge clk) comparing two signals for equality

features.name: always_ff_with_equality_check
features.description: Code should include an always_ff block with an if condition checking equality between two signals, using posedge clock
features.snippet: always_ff @(posedge clk) begin if (divs_out1 != divs_out2) begin $display("failure"); $fatal(); end end

features.name: sva_sampled_value_semantics
features.description: Code should include SVA assert property comparing signals that may have different sampled vs actual value semantics causing false positives
